Supple Scale Armband  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: WRIST
AC: 3
WIS: +5 INT: +5 MANA: +25
SV FIRE: +10
Focus: Extended Range III
WT: 0.1 Size: SMALL
Class: CLR DRU SHM NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Supple Scale Armband
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: WRIST
AC: 3
WIS: +5 INT: +5 MANA: +25
SV FIRE: +10
Focus: Extended Range III
WT: 0.1 Size: SMALL
Class: CLR DRU SHM NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Monk
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):0, 0, 0
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-12 05:14:29
Page Updated:Fri Sep 6th, 2024

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 45
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Karnor's Castle
NPC Name
a Drolvarg warlord


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Karnor's Castle


Uploaded September 6th, 2024 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
Post Comment
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 26 2005 at 1:00 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) A full group of Low 50's with 2 clerics, a necro, rogue, warrior and a pally had little trouble getting into jail section of KC and camping the hand room. Some gems - star ruby and the like - dropped on some of the hands and this bracelet dropped off the first warlord the pally pulled.
Finally!!
QuoteReply
# Jun 14 2004 at 3:31 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760027742
View User Forum
Sage
585 posts
I had been hanging out in KC for a while, trying to convince groups to let me join, and then trying to get them to move/pull beyond entrance and LCY/RCY so I could get this piece. Often monks or bards will be in KC to camp the warlord/bodyguard/pawduster room for their epic drops, and I finally grouped with a couple to get this. Pawduster spawned twice in a row for us, so the monk got his pipe and a pally got another pipe to MQ. Not until both 'dusters spawned did a warlord pop for me, and then I got my armband, and I think the pally got the werewolf skull for mq'ing for a bard.
This camp can easily be done by one healer, one melee and one enchanter (high 40's - low 50's) but can also be duo-ed by one healer and one good monk puller or maybe a beastlord (mid 50's) or a good pally instead of a healer if both are mid-high 50's. A full group of low 40's should be able to handle hands/wl room too, as long as you have crowd control available.
Be careful with the adds, have root ready and kill them dogs!!
▲ Page top
Yikes
QuoteReply
# Jul 18 2003 at 11:15 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759167585
270 posts
Wow, I must have this armband. I am getting tired of my Serpentine Bracer anyway, it doesn't add any to INT and to my knowledge mana either. I hardly ever use my Choke line of spells so Burning Affliction doesn't help me at all. This is a very nice wrist item, I hope I can fight my way into KC soon, I've only been there a few times.
▲ Page top
pullers
QuoteReply
# Jun 16 2003 at 7:06 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593966338972
30 posts
the best puller for hands/WL is prolly a pally or monk w/ great FD awarebess. a 51 + pally like me can pacify and single pull almost all of KC. i've only witnessed one better puller than myself or anther pall and it was a monk who was pulln hands wl RCY LCY. we had mad DPS. so if ur in LCY and wanna do hands wl and u got no monk and a dumb pally let him know about pacify believe it er not ive ran into MANY who dont
▲ Page top
pullers

the best puller for hands/WL is prolly a pally or monk w/ great FD awarebess. a 51 + pally like me can pacify and single pull almost all of KC. i've only witnessed one better puller than myself or anther pall and it was a monk who was pulln hands wl RCY LCY. we had mad DPS. so if ur in LCY and wanna do hands wl and u got no monk and a dumb pally let him know about pacify believe it er not ive ran into MANY who dont

View User Forum
Scholar
72 posts
got this when i was trying to get some jarsath armor for my char i was starting on the seventh hammer server, its effect is realy cool

harpoon lvl 11 barbarian shaman
jarsath lvl 10 iksar shaman (jarsath armor looks cooler on him)
hukulk lvl 15 shadowknight
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 02 2003 at 11:41 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) is this good **** drop often ?
RE: Drop rate ?
QuoteReply
# May 06 2003 at 4:10 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759750075
View User Forum
Scholar
210 posts
Have to be lucky, but drops off of every single Warlord kill, havn't seen a single exception. One night we had 8 drop, next 0, average only 2 a night (2-3 hours playing). Yes, I've seen 2 warlords up at the same time, slowers are very important in the camp so as a chanter should be able to get in there.
▲ Page top
RE: Drop rate ?
QuoteReply
# May 02 2003 at 7:13 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591761377628
8 posts
The effect makes it a great item for any caster.
▲ Page top
RE: Drop rate ?
QuoteReply
# May 07 2003 at 10:39 AM Rating: Decent
Tassoth
574 posts
I've recently been killing here and the jail on my Beastlord since I need to get a friend monk his KC pipe. Managed to fight here and easily hold camp with just myself 56 BL, 51Mnk and 52 cleric. since i was slowing (30%) and get my pet on one while breaking the camp if we got adds.

I found that often there were two spawns of the warlord standing right next to the other one and this bracelt dropped pretty often, about every other kill or 40%ish. I turned it down since i hace a darkwater pearl necklace for ext3 and cant use this. Cleric had one and Mnk's cant use nor would need to. Very common drop so you all know and easy camp for peeps as long as someone knows what they're doing and you can split the camp. Jail pulls are easy to single pull even without a Monk since they're staggered doors.
____________________________
The Real Iksar

Madho
Novocane
Poldarn
▲ Page top
nice
QuoteReply
# Mar 31 2003 at 6:52 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592760063884
174 posts
was in DL and was just messin around runnin all over for apparent reason when i get a tell from some guy... hey hey come into KC sumtin dropped u can use.... so i said ok and he took me in and brought me to it and i looted this thing .... also got a drachnid thyxl from same guy for 150pp ... he killed it and i looted it.... i think it was a good deal since im onyl 39...

#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 13 2002 at 12:10 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) well, won the roll :PP
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 22 2002 at 12:54 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Got this for my necro at lvl 25, asked the hand group to loot the warlord when one dropped cause no one needed one so i just made my way to hands FD and waited and i got one.
New Focus Effect
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2002 at 9:28 PM Rating: Decent

8 posts
Thats correct. As of the 6\5\02 patch this item now has a worn effect of "Extended Range III"

Edited, Wed Jun 5 22:17:38 2002
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 04 2002 at 8:55 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Supposedly on the june 5th patch they will add "Extended Range 3" effect to this item.
Supple Scale
QuoteReply
# Apr 23 2002 at 10:01 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593362113895
Scholar
25 posts
Like Droggle from two posts below, i too was fortunate enough to get into a hands group where the Warlord dropped the Supple Scale armband. I was totally unaware the item even existed until the group leader told me to take the item. When I looted it and checked the stats I was most surprised and ecstatic. I was wearing one PBB and one gold chitin bracer, needless to say the PBB is now in storage. At AC3 int5 wis5 mana25 and fr 10, I can't say there is a better wrist item for pure casters up to level 50. Unfortunately, its no drop, but it'll be a permanent fixture on my wrists until I can find something better.
▲ Page top
Nice combo with another KC drop
QuoteReply
# Apr 05 2002 at 7:42 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591756863518
View User Forum
132 posts
Pair this up with a Jar scale Bracer:
ends up something like +3 ac +5 int +10 fr +25 mana over the common non-twink pair of CBB's. Plan on grabbing one when I can but unfortunatly I lose that cool look from my RMB :(.

I suggest that pair to shamans though, very nice ;)
▲ Page top
Luck...
QuoteReply
# Jan 29 2002 at 12:58 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591756561707
16 posts
This is one of the few items I won a roll on (that I could actually use), and when I did I was so glad. I had never been to Warlord's Room before and thought I had just gotten a rare item. I was wrong, within an hour at least 4 of them spawned carrying it and everyone in my group that needed got one. After that we let ten more go to rot, as no one needed them.

Its a pretty good item that replaced my PBB, but I know there is better. Still for time being im happy I got it and will bring my other characters to the area, as it is a common drop.
▲ Page top
Very COMMON
QuoteReply
# Jan 24 2002 at 9:58 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591767089005
View User Forum
212 posts
I was in the WL room, and he dropped these 5 out of 5 spawns. I finally got them by default because after our cleric, mage and enchanter got them, the cleric and mage left, and necro arrived, as well as another enchanter. The enchanter got them before me (apparently, I SUCK at rolling), and we were the only 2 to roll, since the necro had them already. So the next drop, I finally got them. I swear, if I had to roll against myself, I would have lost!
Anyway, nice armband to replace the RMB.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 17 2002 at 12:22 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Been there and I feel your pain, jus won one tonight, but it was a miracle. Oh wait I'm a cleric, I'm in the miracle business =p
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 21 2001 at 8:32 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) anyone else not understand why this is a wrist slot item? its called and armband, what other items do we know called armbands? umm platnium armband maybe? and where does that go...ARM SLOT. man wonder if that was intended or another verant ***** up?
RE: ARMband
QuoteReply
# Sep 01 2001 at 2:47 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591760647436
9 posts
Verant didnt ***** up, they just dont really care if somethings name doesnt make sense. Take hollow bone bracers for example. (i think thats the name of them, off rathyl's reincarnation in najena.) They say bracers, yet are armbands.
▲ Page top
RE: ARMband
QuoteReply
# Jul 19 2003 at 12:20 PM Rating: Good

well its a lower arm band =)

nice item

# Jul 13 2001 at 7:37 AM Rating: Default

24 posts
I've been looking for a better bracer for my mage and there just isn't one.. not that I can get easily anyway.. this is an awesome bracer for mage at least, beats the crap out of Apothic and some of the velious quest bracers (thurg).
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Aug 18 2001 at 10:16 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) you can get this bracer pretty easy just goto KC find out if the area is camped, cant remember who drops off anymore...dog something or another anywho go with them these are common drop and notice lore no drop so cant make profit off of em...by and by very easy to get.
